entry_points.route_registry_reason: public health and dashboard redirect do not create trading entry candidates
entry_points.arbiter_reason: read-only liveness and redirect surface

entry_points.route_registry_reason: HTTP routing coverage is governed by AccessControlContract, not entry-mode route registry
entry_points.arbiter_reason: read/export/log routes are access controlled but do not directly arm entry candidates

entry_points.route_registry_reason: manual admin mutation routes do not create autonomous entry candidates
entry_points.arbiter_reason: AccessControlContract, AuditLogIntegrityContract, DirectDatabaseMutationBan, and WritePathRegistryContract arbitrate these mutations

entry_points.route_registry_reason: manual evidence routes refresh governance evidence, not trading entry mode routing
entry_points.arbiter_reason: AccessControlContract and AuditLogIntegrityContract arbitrate manual evidence mutation attempts

entry_points.route_registry_reason: dynamic log routes are diagnostic read surfaces
entry_points.arbiter_reason: diagnostic log read surfaces are access controlled

entry_points.route_registry_reason: bootstrap starts the dashboard before runtime import and delegates route governance
entry_points.arbiter_reason: paper-mode preload and health bootstrap gate runtime startup

entry_points.route_registry_reason: runtime delegates entry candidate routing to registered entry modes and sidecar workers
entry_points.arbiter_reason: PaperModeSafetyBoundary and mode readiness contracts gate startup

entry_points.route_registry_reason: dashboard HTTP routes are governed by AccessControlContract
entry_points.arbiter_reason: AccessControlContract, AuditLogIntegrityContract, and write-path governance arbitrate dashboard mutations

entry_points.route_registry_reason: launcher starts sidecar entry points registered separately
entry_points.arbiter_reason: feature flags and worker-specific lock files arbitrate sidecar startup

entry_points.route_registry_reason: preflight cleanup does not create trading entry candidates
entry_points.arbiter_reason: filesystem cleanup is constrained by preflight cleanup policy

entry_points.route_registry_reason: paper trade monitor can arm and close paper positions through registered entry modes
entry_points.arbiter_reason: entry-mode registry, paper-mode safety, SQLite single-writer lock, and mode readiness govern this worker

entry_points.route_registry_reason: lifecycle tracker records outcomes and does not create trading entry candidates
entry_points.arbiter_reason: lifecycle output feeds evidence and label governance

entry_points.route_registry_reason: external alpha scout records candidates for downstream gated workers
entry_points.arbiter_reason: external alpha evidence policy and worker lock file arbitrate writes

entry_points.route_registry_reason: source resonance records evidence for gated entry paths
entry_points.arbiter_reason: external alpha evidence policy and worker lock file arbitrate writes

entry_points.route_registry_reason: social signal service is an enrichment service
entry_points.arbiter_reason: service output is consumed by downstream evidence and entry gates

entry_points.route_registry_reason: paper fast lane can insert paper entries and must stay bound to registered entry modes
entry_points.arbiter_reason: feature flags, paper-mode safety, and SQLite single-writer lock arbitrate this sidecar

entry_points.route_registry_reason: review snapshot worker materializes read models and does not create entries
entry_points.arbiter_reason: read model freshness and snapshot governance arbitrate this worker
